response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience and a robust background in full-stack development, but his profile lacks direct relevance to hardware/SoC modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis. His work has focused on web/mobile applications, embedded systems, and general software development, with no clear evidence of expertise in hardware-software co-design, performance bottlenecks in AI workloads, or system architecture for cloud infrastructure. The educational background (Bachelor's in Computer Science and Photography) does not align with the advanced technical requirements for a Principal Performance Architect role in AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in full-stack development (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, etc.)
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency systems and real-time metadata handling
Proven ability to design and maintain scalable infrastructure (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator architecture
Lacks specialized knowledge in SIMD/MIMD architectures, GPU workload analysis, or deep neural network optimization
Educational and professional background does not meet the required qualifications for this role (no advanced degrees or equivalent AI/accelerator experience)
